children.heading: Criteria for sanitary landfills
children.label: a Criteria for sanitary landfills
children.text: Not later than one year after , after consultation with the States, and after notice and public hearings, the Administrator shall promulgate regulations containing criteria for determining which facilities shall be classified as sanitary landfills and which shall be classified as open dumps within the meaning of this chapter. At a minimum, such criteria shall provide that a facility may be classified as a sanitary landfill and not an open dump only if there is no reasonable probability of adverse effects on health or the environment from disposal of solid waste at such facility. Such regulations may provide for the classification of the types of sanitary landfills.October 21, 1976

children.heading: Disposal required to be in sanitary landfills, etc.
children.label: b Disposal required to be in sanitary landfills, etc.
children.text: For purposes of complying with section 6943(2) of this title each State plan shall prohibit the establishment of open dumps and contain a requirement that disposal of all solid waste within the State shall be in compliance with such section 6943(2) of this title.11See References in Text note below.1

children.heading: Effective date
children.label: c Effective date
children.text: The prohibition contained in subsection (b) shall take effect on the date six months after the date of promulgation of regulations under subsection (a).
